description: Capability-derived READ tool call (get_work_order, enabled by Capability.GET_WORK_ORDER) emitted as plain-text content. Provenance: conversational eval baseline 2026-06-10 -- 'executing_tool tool=get_work_order' showed the tool dispatches for real, yet the leak disposition logged 'tool_call_leak_suppressed known=False' because the known set was a module-level frozenset of BUILTIN_TOOLS, not the agent instance's tool surface. The fix derives disposition from the same _get_available_tools() source dispatch uses, so this leak now recovers via the bounded re-entry path: the read executes once, its result is fed back, and the model's next completion is the real answer.
user_messages: What's the status of work order WO-001?

turns.content: Work order WO-001 is in progress: a corrective bearing replacement on pump P-201.
